The species is native to the temperate forests of Patagonia and is known for its distinctive leaves and flowers. Patagonium odontophyllum is closely related to other species in the Rubiaceae family, such as gardenias and coffee plants. Further classification of the species is ongoing and may be subject to revision as new research becomes available.
